LAW AND MOTION 302, FEDERATED MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE IS GRANTED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. FEDERATED MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR FEDERATED MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Intervene
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Federated Mutual Insurance Company's Motion for Leave to Intervene is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants Federated Mutual Insurance Company's leave to intervene as a defendant in this action on Behalf of Defendant Guillermo Jose Deleon-Orozco. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 387(d)(1)(B).) Federated Mutual Insurance Company shall file its answer in intervention forthwith, but no later than 20 days after entry of this order. Federated Mutual Insurance Company should present this order at the time it submits its answer in intervention for filing.

The court notes Plaintiff's conditions on her response. The court declines to impose conditions on intervention. Trial is five months out. The court notes concerns regarding discovery deadlines and trial dates must be addressed to Department 206.

Federated Mutual Insurance Company must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org no later than 8:30 am on 8/8/2025 a proposed order quoting the above text verbatim.

No proposed order received. Federated Mutual Insurance Company failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for Federated Mutual Insurance Company is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-14-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
